tray.startHint: Start a recent task or create new

connection.title: Connection
connection.description: Connect to your Kimai instance using its base URL and a personal API token. You can save multiple connections and switch between them.
connection.connectionNameDescription: A friendly name for this connection
connection.baseUrlDescription: The root URL of your Kimai installation
connection.apiTokenDescription: Generate one in Kimai → Settings → API
connection.httpsWarning: Insecure connection — your API token may be transmitted in plain text. Use HTTPS in production.

general.title: General
general.description: Configure startup behavior, data refresh, and automatic updates.
general.launchAtLoginDescription: Start KimaiTray automatically when you log in
general.refreshIntervalDescription: How often to sync data from Kimai
general.openKimaiInBrowserDescription: Open your Kimai instance in the default browser
general.trayLeftClickDescription: What happens when you left-click the tray icon
general.trayRightClickDescription: What happens when you right-click the tray icon
general.displayModeDescription: Choose how the popup window is displayed
general.displayModeTrayDescription: Popup attached to the tray icon

traySettings.title: Tray & Menu Bar
traySettings.description: Configure tray icon behavior, menu bar display, and popup window mode.
traySettings.macOnly: Menu bar labels are only available on macOS.
traySettings.linuxOnly: Tray click actions are not available on Linux.

timerSettings.title: Timer
timerSettings.description: Control how running timers appear in the menu bar and tray.
timerSettings.menuBarLabelDescription: What to display next to the tray icon while a timer is running

idle.title: Idle Detection
idle.description: Detect when you step away and decide what happens to the running timer.
idle.enableIdleDescription: Monitor system activity to detect inactivity
idle.idleThresholdDescription: Minutes of inactivity before considered idle
idle.whenIdleDescription: What to do with the running timer
idle.showNotificationDescription: Display a system notification when idle is detected

appearanceSettings.title: Appearance
appearanceSettings.description: Customize the look and feel of KimaiTray.
appearanceSettings.roundedCornersDescription: Round the popup edges like native macOS tray apps
appearanceSettings.uiSizeDescription: Adjust the size of the popup window elements
appearanceSettings.accentColorDescription: Used for active states and primary actions
appearanceSettings.popupLayoutDescription: Choose how sections are arranged in the tray popup
appearanceSettings.layoutClassicDescription: Timer, recent tasks, and today's log
appearanceSettings.layoutFocusDescription: Large timer with tabbed content below
appearanceSettings.colorModeDescription: Choose which color to show next to entries

shortcuts.title: Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Configure global keyboard shortcuts that work even when KimaiTray is not focused.
shortcuts.togglePopupDescription: Show or hide the tray popup window

updateSettings.title: Update
updateSettings.description: Configure how KimaiTray handles application updates.
updateSettings.autoUpdateDescription: Automatically download and install updates when available

featuresSettings.title: Features
featuresSettings.description: Toggle optional fields in the new task form and active timer card.
featuresSettings.noteDescription: Description field when creating or editing a timer
featuresSettings.tagsDescription: Tag input when creating or editing a timer
featuresSettings.pausedDescriptionHoverDescription: Show the paused timer description instead of the activity name on hover
featuresSettings.customerSelectDescription: Customer dropdown to filter projects in the new task form
featuresSettings.customStartTimeDescription: Option to set a custom start time when creating a new task

aboutSection.title: About
aboutSection.appDescription: A free, open-source Kimai time-tracking companion for your menu bar. Built with Tauri, React, and TypeScript.
aboutSection.supportDescription: KimaiTray is free for everyone — no premium tiers, no paywalls. If you find it useful, consider supporting development.

notifications.idleWhileTracking: You were idle for {{minutes}} min while tracking "{{project}}"

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect to GitLab or GitHub to link issues to your time entries.
integrations.enabledDescription: Show issue picker in the new task form
integrations.baseUrlDescription: Root URL of your GitLab or GitHub instance
integrations.apiBaseUrlDescription: Override for GitHub Enterprise (leave empty for standard)
integrations.apiTokenDescription: Personal access token — GitLab: read_api, or api if time sync is enabled — GitHub: repo
integrations.defaultStateDescription: Which issues to show by default
integrations.assigneeOnlyDescription: Show only issues assigned to the authenticated user
integrations.filterLabelsDescription_include: Show only issues with selected labels. Test the connection first to load available labels.
integrations.filterLabelsDescription_exclude: Hide issues that have any of the selected labels. Test the connection first to load available labels.
integrations.filterLabelsHint: Test the connection to load available labels.
integrations.syncTimeDescription: Log spent time to the linked GitLab issue when the timer stops
integrations.autoInsertUrlDescription: Automatically add the issue URL to the timer description when an issue is selected
integrations.perConnectionHint: These settings apply only to the currently active connection
